title: Upgrade Astro 5.16.12 → 6.4.5
description: Astro 6.4.5 is the current latest; the framework is pinned to astro@5.16.12. Capture the upgrade scope: what changed in Astro 6, the breaking changes, and the concrete impact on this codebase (astro.config.mjs, the SSR module-invalidation cache work, the dev-toolbar integration, parsers, layouts). Also documents a gap: ./start self-updates the framework code via git pull but never reinstalls dependencies.
author: claude
